name: Launch Gate
description: Final readiness checkpoint before project handoff. Reads all upstream contracts, generates a structured launch checklist (PASS/WARN/FAIL/DEFERRED per item), and requires operator sign-off. Deferred items (e.g. escalated AI keys) are documented with owner, due date, and the ticket to track them — they do not block launch.

checks.prompt: Generate a comprehensive launch readiness checklist by synthesising all upstream contracts. For each item indicate: PASS, WARN, FAIL, or DEFERRED. Categories: (1) Core scaffold completeness, (2) UX screen coverage, (3) AI integration status (note any escalated items as DEFERRED), (4) Security baseline (HTTPS, env vars, no hardcoded secrets), (5) CI/CD pipeline, (6) Documentation. For DEFERRED items include: owner field, due date, and tracking reference.
